case_title: CHUA, KIM vs. WOOLF, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOOLF, DAVID SIMONS, MARGARET KATH, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1480 WALLER ST, #3, S.F, CA. $2,203.28 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,203.28, COSTS PER COST BILL.
